note: Seed example projects the user can load into the Finder with one tap. Each entry carries the textarea description and the capability IDs (from CAP_GROUPS in app.js) that should be pre-checked.

examples.title: Young Carpets marketing site
examples.oneLine: 3D explode-view hero video + clean modern product site.
examples.goal: A marketing site for Young Carpets Inc whose hero shot pushes from outside the office building through a window, then explodes a carpet sample into its three layers (carpet, pad, subfloor) before reassembling. Clean modern design, premium motion on scroll and section transitions.

examples.title: Young Carpets employee portal
examples.oneLine: Internal web app — customers, products, quotes, invoices (PDF).
examples.goal: An internal web app for the Young Carpets sales team. Customers + products databases, quote builder with live totals, invoice PDF export. Single-tenant login, not public. Clean and dense UI — zero marketing fluff.

examples.title: Commission calculator (ACCPAC Plus DOS)
examples.oneLine: Local Python/Node script that parses a DOS-era print-to-file report.
examples.goal: A local program (not a website) that reads ACCPAC Plus for DOS print-to-file reports — fixed-width, cp437-encoded — computes per-rep commissions, and exports a summary report. Optional small desktop UI later.
